{{Quote|It's quite a find. Mandalorian artifacts are extremely ''rare''. The two items discovered on the moon of Korasa appear to be ''very'' special indeed.|[[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], to [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]|<ref name="Mandalorian Memories">{{TCWComicCite|6.41|Mandalorian Memories}}</ref>}}
'''Korasa''' was the smallest of three [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], in the area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. The surface of this frozen satellite was covered with dunes of snow.

Korasa was the only moon of Kamino explored by the native [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]], who established a small outpost many centuries before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. This outpost was eventually abandoned several hundred years before the Kaminoans took on the contract to clone the soldiers of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].

{{Moon-stub}}
